content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1–4.5.3 WARN — HomeKit framework imported and HMHomeManager instantiated in WallpaperGridView.swift:2-5, but the app is a wallpaper gallery with no home-automation UI or accessory features; metadata (description.txt) confirms this is purely a wallpaper app.
Pierre: Apple explicitly requires HomeKit to be used for its intended purpose — home automation — per guideline 2.5.1, and reviewers do flag apps that import HomeKit without any corresponding home-management UI as potential misuse. Here `HMHomeManager()` is created but never used, and the app's entire feature set (browsing/saving wallpapers) has nothing to do with smart-home control. Recommend removing the unused HomeKit import/instance entirely unless a genuine home-automation feature is planned.
